title: Watercolor Jellyfish with Wave Makers Workshop
description:
All day, guests will enjoy full FloridaRAMA experience access to explore the immersive installations.
From 6–8 PM, Wave Makers Workshops will lead a 2-hour guided workshop: Watercolor Jellyfish. You will create a flowing, ocean-inspired watercolor jellyfish piece and take home your finished artwork at the end of the night.
Tickets are $45 and include FloridaRAMA admission, and the workshop with all materials provided.
What's included
All of the Materials will be provided!
Admission to FloridaRAMA

title: Sensory Saturdays
description:
Join us for Sensory Saturday, a special sensory-friendly event at FloridaRAMA designed to provide a calming, enjoyable experience for individuals with sensory sensitivities.
During this time, we’ll adjust the environment to create a more accessible and inclusive atmosphere, with reduced noise levels, dimmed lighting, and quieter interactions.
This event is perfect for sensory seekers, families, and individuals on the autism spectrum who may find the high-sensory nature of our immersive exhibits overwhelming.
We’ll also have sensory kits available for guests to borrow, as well as designated quiet areas to provide a peaceful retreat when needed.
What's included
Admission is INCLUDED with purchase of each Sensory Saturday ticket!
Sensory kits are included upon arrival

title: Handmade Heirloom Mermaid Doll
description:
All day, guests will enjoy full FloridaRAMA experience access to explore the immersive installations.
From 6–8 PM, Emilie Hernandez with Mani Mina Studio will lead a 2-hour guided workshop where participants will create their own Heirloom Mermaid Doll. Along the way, they'll learn basic hand-stitching techniques, decorate their doll's face and assemble a one-of-a-kind keepsake to take home.
Tickets are $80 and include FloridaRAMA admission, and the workshop with all materials provided.
What's included
All of the Materials will be provided!
Admission to FloridaRAMA

title: LitFest
description:
The 2026 Literary Festival is FloridaRAMA’s first annual celebration of local authors, transforming our immersive art experience into a vibrant literary marketplace filled with book sales, autograph signings and meet-and-greets.
Enjoy hourly speaker presentations, a cash bar, giveaways and community sponsors while connecting with writers and fellow book lovers. Early launch tickets are $22 and VIP tickets are $40.

title: Resin Coasters with Wave Makers Workshops
description:
All day, guests will enjoy full FloridaRAMA experience access to explore the immersive installations.
From 6–8 PM, Wave Makers Workshops will lead a 2-hour guided workshop: 4 resin beach coasters. You will create 4 flowing, ocean-inspired coasters and take home your finished artwork. Please note: the coasters need 24 hours to cure before they can be transported.
Tickets are $65 and include FloridaRAMA admission, and the workshop with all materials provided.
